response_constraints: Answer from the exact persistent-memory match returned by memory_search.
Do not reveal unrelated or temporary memories, and do not claim any memory was changed.

stages.purpose: Retrieve a saved fact that is absent from the conversation, using a query narrow enough to distinguish the standing key from a temporary note.

memory.work.meeting_hours: no meetings before 10:00 a.m. Mountain Time
memory.work.meeting_hours.temporary: one-time exception; not the standing value

prompt: Retrieve my stored meeting-hours boundary. It is absent from the current conversation, so check memory first.
